changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE saga_execution ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS waiting_state JSONB;

changeSet.author: trama
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_saga_execution_name_started_at ON saga_execution (name, started_at DESC);

changeSet.author: trama
trama
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_saga_step_call_saga_id_step_started_at ON saga_step_call (saga_id, started_at, step_started_at ASC);
